scripts.companion:dev: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; export CARGO_INCREMENTAL=1 CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_INCREMENTAL=true; cargo watch --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || cargo install cargo-watch; cd companion; exec cargo watch -w src -w Cargo.toml -x run'
scripts.companion:build:linux: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; cargo build --release --manifest-path companion/Cargo.toml; mkdir -p companion/vendor/bin; cp companion/target/release/cloudadmin-companion companion/vendor/bin/cloudadmin-companion.new; chmod +x companion/vendor/bin/cloudadmin-companion.new; mv -f companion/vendor/bin/cloudadmin-companion.new companion/vendor/bin/cloudadmin-companion'
scripts.companion:build:windows: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; rustup target add x86_64-pc-windows-gnu >/dev/null; cargo build --release --manifest-path companion/Cargo.toml --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu; mkdir -p companion/vendor/bin; cp companion/target/x86_64-pc-windows-gnu/release/cloudadmin-companion.exe companion/vendor/bin/cloudadmin-companion.exe.new; chmod +x companion/vendor/bin/cloudadmin-companion.exe.new; mv -f companion/vendor/bin/cloudadmin-companion.exe.new companion/vendor/bin/cloudadmin-companion.exe'
scripts.companion:build:all: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; npm run companion:build:linux; npm run companion:build:windows'
scripts.companion:run: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; test -x companion/vendor/bin/cloudadmin-companion || { echo "Companion binary missing at companion/vendor/bin/cloudadmin-companion"; echo "Run: npm run companion:build"; exit 1; }; exec companion/vendor/bin/cloudadmin-companion'
